name: SWAP 6-Week Plan (6 weeks)
author: David Roche & Megan Roche, MD PhD
description: Bundled training plan imported from SWAP_Plans PDF templates.

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec hill strides fast with 1-2 min
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 6 x 30 sec hill strides fast with 1-2 min easy recovery

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy warm-up, 5 x 2 min hills mod/hard (think 5k)
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy warm-up, 5 x 2 min hills mod/hard (think 5k) with run down recovery, 4 x 1 min hills hard with run down recovery, 2-3 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy (Thurs can be on fun trails any week)
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy (Thurs can be on fun trails any week)

sessions.pace_description: Rest or 3-6 mi easy (x-train an option on any Friday)
sessions.notes: Rest or 3-6 mi easy (x-train an option on any Friday)

sessions.pace_description: 8-16 mi easy on trails with 20 min with more effort,
sessions.notes: 8-16 mi easy on trails with 20 min with more effort, thinking 1-hour effort to start and progressing to hard

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy in the middle
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec fast/2 min easy in the middle (Sun ideally on trails each week, and you can sub in x-training too)

sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 2 x (5 x 1 min fast/1 min easy) with 3 min easy between sets, 3 min easy, 4 x 1 min hills hard with run down recovery, 2-3 mi easy. On flatter intervals, think 5k effort, with more effort on hills
